Lost link

This page packed up and moved.

You followed a URL to something I renamed, rewrote, or retired. The writing is probably still here — it just lives at a new address now.

If you wound up here from an old link and can't find what you were looking for, mail me at hi@fromparth.blog and I'll point you to it. Or pick a room:
